contradictions.description: Piotr the Miller claimed to be at church, but Lev the Dockworker saw them at town_square (Day 1, Chunk 1)

conversationLogs.response: I was at the market earlier.
I was at the church earlier. I saw Dasha the Healer near the cellar. If you ask me, Dasha the Healer changed their story about where they were.
I was at the market earlier.
I was at the church earlier. I saw Lev the Dockworker near the town square. If you ask me, Dasha the Healer changed their story about where they were.
I was at the town square earlier. I saw Elena the Innkeeper near the docks.
